name: pptx_intelligence
description: Complete PPTX Intelligence Suite for Potomac. Use this tool whenever the user wants to work with presentations — merge decks, generate new presentations, analyze slides, export to PDF, revise content, check brand compliance, extract text, generate speaker notes, or any other presentation task. This single tool handles ALL presentation intelligence automatically — just pass the user's request and any uploaded files. The AI classifies the intent and executes the right pipeline.

prompt.description: The user's natural language request. Examples: 'Take slides 15-19 from deck A and add to composite deck', 'Create a 10-slide investor pitch about Q2 strategy', 'Export this to PDF', 'Delete slide 7 and change Q1 to Q2', 'Check this deck for brand compliance', 'Write speaker notes for every slide', 'What does this report say? Give me 5 bullets'

file_ids.description: Optional array of previously-uploaded file IDs to include. Use when the user has already uploaded files to the system.

audience.description: Target audience: general | investors | board | clients

tone.description: Presentation tone: professional | executive | formal | casual

slide_range.description: Slide range [start, end] for merge operations (1-based inclusive)

generate_notes.description: Also generate speaker notes for every slide

quick_mode.description: Use fast heuristic outline instead of AI planning

palette.description: Slide color palette: STANDARD | DARK | INVESTMENT | FUNDS (default: STANDARD)

disclaimer.description: Custom footer disclaimer for table/chart slides (overrides default regulatory text)

response_schema.explanation: string — human-readable description of what was done
response_schema.download_url: string — /pptx/download/{job_id} to get the output PPTX/PDF
response_schema.plan: object — DeckPlan if a deck was generated
response_schema.analyses: array — Vision analyses if slides were analyzed
response_schema.transcript: string — extracted text if text operation
response_schema.session_id: string — editing session ID if session was created

supported_intents.merge: Take slides from one deck and add to another — 'Take slides 15-19 from meet_potomac.pptx and incorporate into composite.pptx'
supported_intents.analyze: Visual analysis of all slides — 'What's on each slide of this deck?'
supported_intents.reconstruct: Convert static image slides to native editable elements — 'Make these image slides editable'
supported_intents.generate_from_doc: Upload a document → AI builds a presentation — 'Turn this annual report into a 10-slide deck'
supported_intents.generate_from_brief: Pure AI generation from a text description — 'Create a 12-slide board deck about Q2 strategy'
supported_intents.export_pdf: Convert PPTX to PDF — 'Export this as a PDF'
supported_intents.export_images: Export slides as PNG images — 'Export all slides as images'
supported_intents.summarize: Distill document content to bullets — 'What are the 5 key points of this report?'
supported_intents.compare: Find duplicate/similar slides between decks — 'Find duplicate slides between these two decks'
supported_intents.brand_audit: Score brand compliance — 'Check this deck for Potomac brand compliance'
supported_intents.brand_fix: Auto-correct brand violations — 'Fix all the branding issues in this deck'
supported_intents.extract_text: OCR + text extraction — 'Get all the text from these slides'
supported_intents.speaker_notes: Generate speaker notes — 'Write speaker notes for every slide'
supported_intents.revise: NLP-driven revision — 'Delete slide 7 and change all Q1 references to Q2'
supported_intents.plan: Get deck structure without generating — 'Plan a 12-slide investor deck structure'
supported_intents.session_create: Start stateful editing session — 'Start editing this deck (I want undo/redo)'

usage_examples.user_says: Hey, can you take slides 15-19 from the Meet Potomac deck and add them to the Composite Details deck?

tool_call.prompt: Take slides 15-19 from the Meet Potomac deck and incorporate them into the Composite Details deck

usage_examples.expected_result: Merged PPTX with download_url and preview_urls for all slides

usage_examples.user_says: Create a 10-slide investor pitch about Potomac's Q2 2026 fund strategy, covering market environment, our 4 strategies, risk metrics, and next steps

tool_call.prompt: Create a 10-slide investor pitch about Potomac's Q2 2026 fund strategy, covering market environment, our 4 strategies, risk metrics, and next steps

usage_examples.expected_result: Generated PPTX with download_url, preview_urls, and deck plan

usage_examples.user_says: Turn this annual report PDF into a presentation

tool_call.prompt: Turn this annual report into a 10-slide executive summary presentation

usage_examples.expected_result: Generated PPTX extracted from PDF content

usage_examples.user_says: What does this report say? Give me the key points

tool_call.prompt: Summarize this report and give me the 5 most important points

usage_examples.user_says: Delete slide 5 and change all Q1 references to Q2

tool_call.prompt: Delete slide 5 and replace all references to Q1 2025 with Q2 2025

usage_examples.expected_result: Revised PPTX with diff report showing changed slides

follow_up_endpoints.session_end: DELETE /pptx/session/{session_id} — End editing session and free resources
